creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks.  It looks like the original site is back up, but I used your patch to add in the other site as a back up and also fixed the size/checksum.

In terms of upgrading, when I looked at that a while back there were a lot of dependencies for the new version that weren't in the ports system.  That may have changed since then, so it is probably worth looking again.
